---
title: "STAT 345 Final Project"
author: "Melia, Gracie, Kylee
output: word_document
date: "2026-04-15"
---

```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)

GENIUS_TOKEN <- "OAvyoTTGQK7L7JgsblybHU6Leb1plm2ppXr2H60JqlNOPbDIYXD5pg0nVA2VO_pV"

rap_songs <- read.csv("rap_songs.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

clean_text <- function(x) {
  x <- enc2utf8(x)
  x <- iconv(x, from = "UTF-8", to = "ASCII//TRANSLIT", sub = "")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[“”]", "\"")
  x <- str_replace_all(x, "[‘’]", "'")
  x <- str_squish(x)
  x
}

search_genius_url <- function(main_artist, title, token = GENIUS_TOKEN) {
  query <- paste(clean_text(main_artist), clean_text(title))

  res <- GET(
    url = "https://api.genius.com/search",
    query = list(q = query),
    add_headers(Authorization = paste("Bearer", token))
  )

  if (status_code(res) != 200) return(NA_character_)

  txt <- content(res, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
  dat <- fromJSON(txt, flatten = TRUE)

  hits <- dat$response$hits
  if (length(hits) == 0 || nrow(hits) == 0) return(NA_character_)

  artist_clean <- tolower(clean_text(main_artist))
  title_clean  <- tolower(clean_text(title))

  result_df <- tibble(
    url = hits$result.url,
    artist = tolower(clean_text(hits$result.primary_artist.name)),
    song = tolower(clean_text(hits$result.title))
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      artist_match = artist == artist_clean,
      song_match = song == title_clean,
      score = 2 * artist_match + 2 * song_match +
              str_detect(song, fixed(title_clean)) +
              str_detect(artist, fixed(artist_clean))
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(score))

  result_df$url[1]
}

get_lyrics_from_genius_url <- function(song_url) {
  if (is.na(song_url) || song_url == "") return(NA_character_)

  page <- tryCatch(
    read_html(song_url),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(page)) return(NA_character_)

  nodes <- html_elements(page, "[data-lyrics-container='true']")
  if (length(nodes) == 0) return(NA_character_)

  lyrics <- nodes %>%
    html_text2() %>%
    paste(collapse = "\n") %>%
    str_replace_all("\\n{2,}", "\n") %>%
    str_trim()

  start_pos <- str_locate(lyrics, "\\[(Intro|Verse|Chorus|Hook|Bridge|Outro)")[1]

  if (!is.na(start_pos)) {
    lyrics <- str_sub(lyrics, start_pos)
  }

  lyrics <- str_trim(lyrics)

  if (lyrics == "") return(NA_character_)
  lyrics
}

clean_lyrics_text <- function(lyrics) {
  if (is.na(lyrics) || lyrics == "") return(NA_character_)

  lyrics <- lyrics %>%
    str_replace_all("\r", "\n") %>%
    str_replace_all("\\n{2,}", "\n") %>%
    
    str_replace_all("([a-z])([A-Z])", "\\1 \\2") %>%
    
    str_replace_all("([a-z0-9])\\[", "\\1\n[") %>%
    
    str_replace_all("\\]([A-Za-z])", "\\]\n\\1") %>%
    
    str_replace_all("[ \t]+", " ") %>%
    str_trim()

  lyrics
}

get_lyrics_genius_api <- function(main_artist, title, token = GENIUS_TOKEN) {
  url <- search_genius_url(main_artist, title, token)
  Sys.sleep(0.5)
  get_lyrics_from_genius_url(url)
}


rap_songs <- rap_songs %>%
  mutate(
    lyrics = map2_chr(main_artist, title, ~ get_lyrics_genius_api(.x, .y)),
    lyrics = map_chr(lyrics, clean_lyrics_text)
  )
write.csv(rap_songs, "rap_songs_with_lyrics.csv", row.names = FALSE)


library(tidytext)
data("stop_words")

word_repetition_score <- function(lyrics) {
  if (is.na(lyrics) || lyrics == "") return(NA_real_)

  words <- lyrics %>%
    tolower() %>%
    str_replace_all("[^a-z0-9\\s']", " ") %>%
    str_split("\\s+") %>%
    unlist()

  words <- words[words != ""]

  words <- words[!words %in% stop_words$word]

  if (length(words) == 0) return(NA_real_)

  1 - (length(unique(words)) / length(words))
}

rap_songs <- rap_songs %>%
  mutate(
    word_repeat_score = map_dbl(lyrics, word_repetition_score)
  )

year_summary <- rap_songs %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_word_repeat = mean(word_repeat_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(year_summary, aes(x = year, y = avg_word_repeat)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
  title = "Word Repetition (Stopwords Removed) in Rap Songs Over Time",
  x = "Year",
  y = "Repetition Score"
)




```

```{r}

```
